item.content:encoded:
Hugging Face Trending Models Digest 2026-07-08

Source: Hugging Face Hub | 30 models | Generated: 2026-07-08 01:48 UTC

Here is the Hugging Face Trending Models Digest for 2026-07-08.

1. Today's Highlights

This week’s trending models are dominated by the Qwen 3.5/3.6 ecosystem, with nearly half of the top 30 being fine-tunes, quantizations, or derivatives of this family. The GLM-5.2 release from zai-org stands out as an unexpected blockbuster, generating 3,591 likes and signaling strong interest in high-performance MoE architectures from Chinese labs. NVIDIA’s LocateAnything-3B is the breakout multimodal hit, proving that specialized spatial reasoning models have massive demand. Meanwhile, the sheer download velocity of HauhauCS’s uncensored Qwen 3.6 variant (2.8M downloads) and unsloth’s GGUF conversion (2.8M downloads) confirms the community’s insatiable appetite for accessible, executable AI.

2. Trending Models

🧠 Language Models (LLMs, chat models, instruction-tuned)

  • zai-org/GLM-5.2 – Author: zai-org | Likes: 3,591 | Downloads: 281,584
    A conversational MoE model from the GLM lineage; trending for its sheer community spike, likely due to strong reasoning benchmarks and accessible Chinese-language performance.

  • bottlecapai/ThinkingCap-Qwen3.6-27B – Author: bottlecapai | Likes: 105 | Downloads: 46
    A reasoning-focused fine-tune of Qwen 3.6; early stage but notable for targeting chain-of-thought capabilities.

  • deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V4-Pro-DSpark – Author: deepseek-ai | Likes: 424 | Downloads: 15,538
    The latest DeepSeek V4 Pro variant with DSpark optimization; trending as a top-tier open-weight reasoning model.

  • meituan-longcat/LongCat-2.0 – Author: meituan-longcat | Likes: 139 | Downloads: 385
    A conversational LLM from Meituan; notable for its long-context capabilities in production-grade Chinese scenarios.

  • tencent/Hy3 – Author: tencent | Likes: 488 | Downloads: 121
    A text-generation model from the Hunyuan family; trending due to Tencent’s push into open-weight foundation models.

  • froggeric/Qwen-Fixed-Chat-Templates – Author: froggeric | Likes: 743 | Downloads: 0
    Not a model, but a chat template fix for Qwen; viral due to widespread template issues across the ecosystem.

🎨 Multimodal & Generation (image, video, audio, text-to-X)

  • nvidia/LocateAnything-3B – Author: nvidia | Likes: 2,657 | Downloads: 1,424,958
    A vision model for spatial object localization; exploding in popularity for robotics and visual grounding applications.

  • HauhauCS/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Uncensored-HauhauCS-Aggressive – Author: HauhauCS | Likes: 2,551 | Downloads: 2,823,988
    An uncensored, vision-capable MoE variant of Qwen 3.6; trending for its refusal-free behavior and high download volume.

  • empero-ai/Qwythos-9B-Claude-Mythos-5-1M-GGUF – Author: empero-ai | Likes: 1,759 | Downloads: 1,683,711
    A mythos-inspired multimodal Qwen 3.5 fine-tune in GGUF format; trending for creative writing and role-play use cases.

  • baidu/Unlimited-OCR – Author: baidu | Likes: 1,833 | Downloads: 1,084,945
    A universal OCR model by Baidu; trending as a high-accuracy, zero-shot document understanding tool.

  • krea/Krea-2-Turbo – Author: krea | Likes: 540 | Downloads: 123,729
    A diffusers-based text-to-image model; trending as a fast image generation backbone.

  • Eric-venti-seeds/Sun-Direction-Lora-Flux2Klein9B – Author: eric-venti-seeds | Likes: 97 | Downloads: 0
    A LoRA for lighting control in Flux2; niche but trending for artistic direction in image-to-image workflows.

🔧 Specialized Models (code, math, medical, embeddings)

  • yuxinlu1/gemma-4-12B-coder-fable5-composer2.5-v1-GGUF – Author: yuxinlu1 | Likes: 2,638 | Downloads: 674,977
    A coding-focused Gemma 4 fine-tune with composer architecture; trending as a strong open-weight coding assistant.

  • yuxinlu1/gemma-4-12B-agentic-fable5-composer2.5-v2-3.5x-tau2-GGUF – Author: yuxinlu1 | Likes: 1,076 | Downloads: 384,383
    An agentic variant of Gemma 4 for terminal/tool-use tasks; trending for CLI automation and agentic coding.

  • Qwen/Qwen-AgentWorld-35B-A3B – Author: Qwen | Likes: 560 | Downloads: 60,736
    Offical Qwen MoE model specialized for agentic environments; trending as the go-to model for tool-use benchmarks.

  • google/tabfm-1.0.0-pytorch – Author: google | Likes: 288 | Downloads: 9,458
    Google’s tabular foundation model for zero-shot classification/regression; trending as a competitive alternative to gradient boosting.

📦 Fine-tunes & Quantizations (community fine-tunes, GGUF, AWQ)

  • unsloth/Qwen3.6-27B-MTP-GGUF – Author: unsloth | Likes: 991 | Downloads: 2,842,118
    Unsoloth’s high-quality GGUF of Qwen 3.6; trending as the #1 download due to its balance of speed and quality.

  • deepreinforce-ai/Ornith-1.0-35B-GGUF – Author: deepreinforce-ai | Likes: 780 | Downloads: 502,663
    A GGUF quantization of the Ornith-1.0 MoE; trending for multi-modal MoE on consumer hardware.

  • deepreinforce-ai/Ornith-1.0-9B-GGUF – Author: deepreinforce-ai | Likes: 452 | Downloads: 454,944
    Lighter sibling of the 35B; trending for local deployment on edge devices.

  • Jackrong/Qwopus3.6-35B-A3B-Coder-MTP-GGUF – Author: Jackrong | Likes: 161 | Downloads: 159,871
    A coding-focused GGUF of Qwen 3.6; trending for lossless code generation in llama.cpp.

  • huihui-ai/Huihui-GLM-5.2-abliterated-GGUF – Author: huihui-ai | Likes: 185 | Downloads: 7,349
    An abliterated (refusal-removed) GGUF of GLM-5.2; trending for uncensored use cases.

  • nvidia/Qwen3.6-27B-NVFP4 – Author: nvidia | Likes: 315 | Downloads: 538,687
    NVIDIA’s FP4 quantized Qwen 3.6; trending for ultra-low-bit inference on NVIDIA hardware.

  • InternScience/Agents-A1-Q4_K_M-GGUF – Author: InternScience | Likes: 74 | Downloads: 11,226
    A quantized vision-language MoE; trending for agentic VLM applications.

3. Ecosystem Signal

The clear signal this week is the rise of the Qwen 3.5/3.6 family as the dominant base for both fine-tuning and quantization. Models from the Qwen lineage (Qwythos, Qwen-AgentWorld, various GGUF variants) account for nearly 40% of the trending list. The community is converging on Qwen as a “base OS” for building specialized models—much like Llama was in 2023/2024.

Another strong trend is the split between official releases (NVIDIA, Google, DeepSeek, Baidu) and community modifications. Official models like LocateAnything-3B and tabfm push the frontier, while community fine-tunes (Ornith, HauhauCS, yuxinlu1’s Gemma 4 variants) show a vibrant open-weight ecosystem. Notably, GGUF is the dominant quantization format, accounting for 10 of the 30 trending models, indicating that local inference is the primary consumption pattern.

Finally, uncensored/abliterated models continue to be a steady, albeit controversial, driver of downloads. The Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-Uncensored and Huihui-GLM-5.2-abliterated models demonstrate persistent demand for models without safety alignment layers.

4. Worth Exploring

  1. nvidia/LocateAnything-3B – This is the strongest signal for spatial AI and visual grounding on open weights. If you work in robotics, document parsing, or visual QA, this model is a must-try. Its 2.6K likes on a specialized model is extraordinary.

  2. yuxinlu1/gemma-4-12B-coder-fable5-composer2.5-v1-GGUF – The highest-liked coding model this week. The “fable5-composer” architecture is experimental, and this GGUF delivers strong coding performance at 12B—ideal for studying how fine-tuning architecture choices affect code generation.

  3. deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V4-Pro-DSpark – As DeepSeek continues to challenge gpt-4-class models, the V4-Pro-DSpark variant is worth evaluating on reasoning and STEM tasks. It is the premium open-weight option in today's trending set for those seeking frontier-level performance.

This digest is auto-generated by agents-radar.
